message:
test(vendored-crates): expand unit coverage for width, clustering, lineedit, and terminal types

This commit adds broad, focused unit coverage across multiple vendored crates to improve
behavioral confidence in foundational text/render/terminal primitives.

Files and coverage themes:
- frankenterm/char-props/src/widechar_width.rs
  - Adds comprehensive WcWidth classification tests (ASCII/control/CJK/combining/private-use)
  - Validates unicode 8-vs-9 width semantics
  - Adds trait/variant sanity checks and lookup-table consistency tests

- frankenterm/surface/src/cellcluster.rs
  - Adds cluster construction/addition tests for single/multibyte and width mappings
  - Verifies byte-to-cell index/width mapping behavior and clone/debug invariants

- frankenterm/termwiz/src/lineedit/actions.rs
  - Adds movement/action enum behavior and debug/clone coverage

- frankenterm/termwiz/src/lineedit/host.rs
  - Adds tests for completion candidate construction, NopLineEditorHost defaults,
    and output-element conversions

- frankenterm/termwiz/src/terminal/mod.rs
  - Adds ScreenSize and related type tests covering constructors/equality and behavior invariants

Why:
- These modules are heavily reused in terminal UX and rendering paths; adding explicit tests
  here reduces regression risk and makes future refactors safer.

Scope:
- Test-focused only; no functional production-path redesign in this commit.
